HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

12#ifndef CLPARSER_H
13#define CLPARSER_H
14
15#include <iostream>
16#include <sstream>
17#include <string>
18
19// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
20// Base parser class
21// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
22
24
30class CLParser {
31 protected:
32 std::string option;
33
34 public:
39 CLParser(std::string opt) : option(opt){};
40
45 CLParser(const char *opt) : option(opt){};
46
48 virtual ~CLParser(){};
49
56 virtual int Parse(int argc, char *argv[]) = 0;
57};
58
59// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
60// Generic option class (expects a typed value)
61// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
62
64
68template <class T>
69class CLOption : public CLParser {
70 protected:
71 T *target;
72
73 public:
79 CLOption(std::string opt, T *targ) : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
80
86 CLOption(const char *opt, T *targ) : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
87
89 virtual ~CLOption(){};
90
97 int Parse(int argc, char *argv[]) {
98 std::stringstream strStream(std::stringstream::in);
99 for (int i = 1; i < argc; i++) {
100 if (std::string(argv[i]) == option) {
101 i++;
102 strStream.str(argv[i]);
103 strStream >> *target;
104 if (strStream.fail()) {
105 std::cerr << "Invalid argument \"" << argv[i] << "\" for option "
106 << option << "." << std::endl;
107 return -1;
108 } else
109 return 1;
110 }
111 }
112 return 0;
113 };
114};
115
116// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
117// String option class
118// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
119
121
125class CLStringOption : public CLParser {
126 protected:
127 std::string *target;
128
129 public:
135 CLStringOption(std::string opt, std::string *targ)
136 : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
137
143 CLStringOption(const char *opt, std::string *targ)
144 : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
145
147 virtual ~CLStringOption(){};
148
155 int Parse(int argc, char *argv[]) {
156 for (int i = 1; i < argc; i++) {
157 if (std::string(argv[i]) == option) {
158 i++;
159 *target = std::string(argv[i]);
160 return 1;
161 }
162 }
163 return 0;
164 };
165};
166
167// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
168// Flag option class
169// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
170
172
176class CLFlag : public CLParser {
177 protected:
178 bool *target;
179
180 public:
181
187 CLFlag(std::string opt, bool *targ) : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
188
194 CLFlag(const char *opt, bool *targ) : CLParser(opt), target(targ){};
195
197 virtual ~CLFlag(){};
198
205 int Parse(int argc, char *argv[]) {
206 for (int i = 1; i < argc; i++) {
207 if (std::string(argv[i]) == option) {
208 *target = true;
209 return 1;
210 }
211 }
212 return 0;
213 };
214};
215
216#endif

Pointer to user bool to be set true if present.
